response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video content: It is an audience montage from a Hololive concert. Fan signs and plushies identify multiple Hololive VTubers, with Hoshimachi Suisei being prominent. 2. Audio Analysis: The continuous background music is the song 'Stellar Stellar' by Hoshimachi Suisei. 3. Lyrics Search: Searched for 'Stellar Stellar Hoshimachi Suisei lyrics' to obtain the official Japanese lyrics and their English translation. 4. JSON Generation: Mapped the identified song, performer, and crowd reaction scenes into the required JSON structure.
response.global_summary: The video is a montage of audience reactions at a live concert featuring various VTubers, primarily Hoshimachi Suisei, from the Hololive agency. Fans are holding placards, plushies, and light sticks, cheering energetically throughout the performance of the song 'Stellar Stellar' by Hoshimachi Suisei.

scenes.description: The crowd cheers and waves light sticks while Hoshimachi Suisei's 'Stellar Stellar' plays in the background, shown by audience signs featuring her and other Hololive VTubers.

きっと君はもう気づいていた
僕の心の奥で描いた
それがこれがら話す陳腐(ちんぷ)な モノローグさ
ずっと言えない言葉があった
壊せない壁があったんだ
ずっとさ ふっと香りたつ朝の匂いが
どうしろうもなく憎らしくて
部屋の隅で膝を抱きえて
震えていた

その手を伸ばして 誰か届くように

ありったけの輝きで 今宵音楽はずっとずっと止まない

待ってるシンデレラじゃないさ 迎えに行く王子様だ

本当に大切なものは目に見えないみたいなんだ

そうだ僕がずっとなりたかったのは

夢見がちなおとぎ話おとぎ話
そうさ僕は夜を歌うよ stellar stellar
ありったけの輝きで 今宵音楽はずっとずっと止まない

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Because I am a star, stellar stellar
Surely you had already noticed
Deep in my heart I drew it
That monologue of trivial things I will speak of now
There were words I could never say
There was a wall I couldn't break
I was always... suddenly, the scent of the morning wafted by
I hated it so much I couldn't help it
In the corner of the room I held my knees
And trembled
I don't need a sun, so stay without breaking into dawn
Stretch out that hand, so it reaches someone
Because I'm not special, just like you
That's right, I'll sing for the night, stellar stellar
With all the radiance I have, tonight the music will never ever stop
That's right, the person I've always wanted to become
Is not a Cinderella waiting, but a Prince Charming going to welcome her
Because I am a star, what a cliché story
I was only writing down the ideals
It's just a scene sleeping in the corner of a notebook
Surely that star is crying too, so stay without the morning coming
Stretch out that hand, so it reaches someone
Truly important things seem invisible
That's right, I'll sing for the night, stellar stellar
Don't think with things as they are, tonight the music will surely surely never stop
That's right, the person I've always wanted to become
Is not a fragile heroine, but a hero going to save her
A dreamy fairy tale, a fairy tale
That's right, I'll sing for the night, stellar stellar
With all the radiance I have, tonight the music will never ever stop
That's right, I'll sing for love, stellar stellar
